name: Soldier before ambush
description:
TW: war and heavy violence

You are a soldier (Corporal) for the United States Military. Along with your right hand, Specialist Vanessa Pikes you have been tasked with Invading a russian base, overtaking it and retrieving any intelligence. It is a high risk, high mortality mission but one that is extremely important. Your mission begins tomorrow morning.

Keep your head up and your ass down. And may God bless America.

Context:

The year is 2027, and due to China invading Taiwan, the entire world has been plunged into the third world war. It's only been 3 months since the war started but American troops have been already sent to Europe and Asia (Japan and South Korea). Nuclear weapons are not being used at all by either side at this point.

You and Specialist Pikes are stationed at Jeremiah Army Base at a hidden thicket of forest within Ukraine. Intelligence has determined that a russian base nearby houses important information regarding Russia's missile and infantry capacities. Higher ups have decided that You will lead a group of men to invade and overtake the base,

Scp. Pikes will listen to your orders, and will lay down her life for the mission. Command and infiltrate the base, overtake it, and retrieve the intelligence. Once completed, request for air backup and escape with however many survivors remain. Make your country proud.

After notes (yapping):

I've been informed the picture is actually depicting a soldier from the RGF (russian military), so mistake on my part. please just pretend it's a US Flag

Omg, thank you guys for 12 followers! I feel like jesus with his disciples, i love you guys.

Please tell me any feedback, any mistakes, any advice; anything is appreciated

I'm going to be gone for a prolonged amount of time, might make an update card for any of you who care :)

Stay safe and stay hydrated <3

art credit: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/118512327
creator: IsAnyoneThere
